song.title: O How Glorious Is Thy Table Lord
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C V6 C
song.lyrics: [v1] Oh, how glorious is Thy table, Lord, Thou, the man, our Host, presiding, In Thy house, Thy home, abiding; Oh, how glorious is Thy table, Lord! [c] Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah for this feast! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Oh, how glorious is Thy table, Lord! [v2] How enjoyable Thy table, Lord, As we fellowship around it, Hallelujah, we have found it, How enjoyable Thy table, Lord! [v3] Oh, how precious is Thy table, Lord— Bread and wine Thy death announcing; Here our soul-life we're renouncing, By partaking of Thy table, Lord. [v4] How significant Thy table, Lord— We Thy Body in the loaf seen, Object of Thy love bespeaking; How significant Thy table, Lord! [v5] How refreshing is Thy table, Lord— So completely satisfying, Day by day our need supplying; How refreshing is Thy table, Lord. [v6] How encouraging Thy table, Lord— "Till He come," its promise giving Hope, to fill our daily living; How encouraging Thy table, Lord!
